tagline: Restoring balance through the Sunnah and professional care.
intro: Experience Hijama (Wet Cupping Therapy) in a clean, calm and welcoming environment where traditional practice is combined with modern standards of hygiene and compassionate, client-centred care.
offer_text: Available for new clients. Terms may apply.
quote: The best medicine with which you treat yourselves is Hijama, or it is one of the best of your medicines.
disclaimer: Hijama is a complementary wellbeing service and is not a substitute for medical diagnosis, treatment or emergency care.
